content: A general-purpose agent can be framed as an emergent system where the stable core of its autonomous behavior self-organizes directly from the competition and complementarity between different curiosity-driven reinforcement learning modules (like ICM and RND) rather than being hard-coded into its architecture. This makes curiosity itself the foundational substrate for agent autonomy rather than just a auxiliary exploration bonus.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
